examples: It's important to spend your time productively.
The debate could not be resolved because no one was able to ask the crucial questions in a form in which they could be pursued productively.
We need to use it as carefully and as productively as we can, that means prioritising our activities so that we spend most time on the things we really want to do.
Otherwise we would all become like you, and civilization would cease to function smoothly and productively.
And so it goes: the calmer Cromwell becomes, the more productively terrifying he is.
